inputs.label: Initial Cannabinoid
inputs.businessContext: Total cannabinoid content before extraction, measured in milligrams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cannabinoid content before extraction, measured in milligrams.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekstraksiyondan önce toplam kannabinoid içeriği, miligram cinsinden ölçülür.

inputs.label: Solvent Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of solvent used in extraction, in milliliters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of solvent used in extraction, in milliliters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekstraksiyonda kullanılan çözücü hacmi, mililitre cinsinden.

inputs.label: Extraction Time
inputs.businessContext: Duration of extraction process in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of extraction process in minutes.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Operating temperature in degrees Celsius, affects rate constant via Arrhenius equation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating temperature in degrees Celsius, affects rate constant via Arrhenius equation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santigrat derece cinsinden işletme sıcaklığı, Arrhenius denklemi yoluyla hız sabitini etkiler.

inputs.label: Pre-exponential Factor
inputs.businessContext: Frequency factor in the Arrhenius rate equation, represents maximum possible rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency factor in the Arrhenius rate equation, represents maximum possible rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arrhenius hız denklemindeki frekans faktörü, mümkün olan maksimum hızı temsil eder.

inputs.label: Activation Energy
inputs.businessContext: Energy barrier for extraction, in joules per mole.

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy barrier for extraction, in joules per mole.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekstraksiyon için enerji bariyeri, mol başına joule cinsinden.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
